title: Bar Bigha Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bar Bigha with a Z-Score of +3.77. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bar Bigha is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperature is resulting in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.2 GG, indicating a substantial need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity of 58% and wind speed of 13.8 km/h are exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Bar Bigha.
